name: Streammirrarr
description: Exact-match stream consolidation. Attaches failover-account streams onto the channels created by your source-of-truth account, matched by provider stream_id (each channel anchored on its own primary stream). No fuzzy matching — runs in seconds, safe to run daily.
author: Roy Dufek

actions.label: 🔍 Preview (dry-run)
actions.description: Compute exactly what would change and report it. Writes nothing.

confirm.title: Run exact-match reconcile?
confirm.message: Rebuilds failover streams on matched channels: attaches exact stream_id matches and removes mismatched managed streams. A backup is taken first. Proceed?

actions.label: 🔍 Preview duplicate cleanup
actions.description: Report duplicate channels (that share a primary stream) without deleting anything.

actions.label: 🗑️ Remove duplicate channels
actions.description: Delete channels that share a primary stream with another (keeps one per stream).

confirm.title: Delete duplicate channels?
confirm.message: For each primary stream attached to more than one channel, this keeps one channel (EPG-bound, else lowest id) and DELETES the rest. A backup is taken first. This removes channels — proceed?

actions.label: 📄 View last results
actions.description: Show the report from the most recent run.

actions.label: 🧹 Clear operation lock
actions.description: Force-clear a stuck run lock if a previous run was interrupted.
